description: P0 Critical fixes: (1) Add force_unload_all_models() + aggressive_cleanup('inter-segment') between each segment in generate_extended_video() for-loop, (2) Replace all imageio.mimsave codec='libx264' calls with a proper ffmpeg-based helper function for h264 quality output
steps: Step 1 - Fix #2 (UNet not freed between segments): In generate_extended_video() at line ~5787, after 'aggressive_cleanup(f"segment {seg_num} done")' (line 5788), add 'force_unload_all_models()' followed by 'aggressive_cleanup("inter-segment")' to ensure full VRAM release between segments.

Step 2 - Fix #4 (imageio stitching quality): Create a helper function 'save_frames_as_mp4(frames_np, output_path, fps=25, crf=19)' that: (a) writes frames via imageio.mimsave to a temp file, (b) re-encodes with ffmpeg using '-c:v libx264 -crf 19 -pix_fmt yuv420p -preset medium -movflags +faststart', (c) falls back to renaming the raw file on failure. Place this helper near the existing helper functions (around line 1880, near _load_audio_vae).

Step 3 - Replace imageio.mimsave at line 5831 in generate_extended_video() final stitching: change 'imageio.mimsave(final_path, [f for f in final_frames_np], fps=fps, codec="libx264")' to 'save_frames_as_mp4(final_frames_np, final_path, fps=fps)'.

Step 4 - Replace imageio.mimsave at line 6342 in run_storyboard() overlap blending: change 'imageio.mimsave(_temp_stitch, [f for f in final_np], fps=FPS, codec="libx264")' to 'save_frames_as_mp4(final_np, _temp_stitch, fps=FPS)'. Note: This temp file is later re-muxed with audio by ffmpeg, so this call just needs to produce a good quality intermediate.

Step 5 - Replace imageio.mimsave at line 6787 in the merge clips section: change 'imageio.mimsave(_temp_video, [f for f in final_np], fps=fps, codec="libx264")' to 'save_frames_as_mp4(final_np, _temp_video, fps=fps)'.

Step 6 - Replace imageio.mimsave at line 7021 in the batch color grade section (Cell 10): change 'imageio.mimsave(_graded_path, [f for f in _graded_np], fps=FPS, codec="libx264")' to 'save_frames_as_mp4(_graded_np, _graded_path, fps=FPS)'.
acceptance_criteria: No remaining instances of 'imageio.mimsave' with 'codec=' parameter in the file
force_unload_all_models() + aggressive_cleanup('inter-segment') appear between segment generation and anchor frame extraction in the generate_extended_video loop
A save_frames_as_mp4 helper function exists that uses subprocess.run with ffmpeg and proper h264 encoding parameters
